members.name: AlignmentHorizontal
members.summary: Specifies the horizontal relative position of child controls.

members.name: AlignmentVertical
members.summary: Specifies the vertical relative position of child controls.

members.name: Ratio
members.summary: The aspect ratio to enforce on child controls. This is the width divided by the height. The ratio depends on the [member stretch_mode].

members.name: StretchMode
members.summary: The stretch mode used to align child controls.

values.name: ALIGNMENT_BEGIN
values.summary: Aligns child controls with the beginning (left or top) of the container.

values.name: ALIGNMENT_CENTER
values.summary: Aligns child controls with the center of the container.

values.name: ALIGNMENT_END
values.summary: Aligns child controls with the end (right or bottom) of the container.

values.name: STRETCH_COVER
values.summary: The width and height of child controls is automatically adjusted to make their bounding rectangle cover the entire area of the container while keeping the aspect ratio. When the bounding rectangle of child controls exceed the container's size and [member Control.clip_contents] is enabled, this allows to show only the container's area restricted by its own bounding rectangle.

values.name: STRETCH_FIT
values.summary: The bounding rectangle of child controls is automatically adjusted to fit inside the container while keeping the aspect ratio.

values.name: STRETCH_HEIGHT_CONTROLS_WIDTH
values.summary: The width of child controls is automatically adjusted based on the height of the container.

values.name: STRETCH_WIDTH_CONTROLS_HEIGHT
values.summary: The height of child controls is automatically adjusted based on the width of the container.

constants.name: STRETCH_WIDTH_CONTROLS_HEIGHT
constants.summary: The height of child controls is automatically adjusted based on the width of the container.

constants.name: STRETCH_HEIGHT_CONTROLS_WIDTH
constants.summary: The width of child controls is automatically adjusted based on the height of the container.

constants.name: STRETCH_FIT
constants.summary: The bounding rectangle of child controls is automatically adjusted to fit inside the container while keeping the aspect ratio.

constants.name: STRETCH_COVER
constants.summary: The width and height of child controls is automatically adjusted to make their bounding rectangle cover the entire area of the container while keeping the aspect ratio. When the bounding rectangle of child controls exceed the container's size and [member Control.clip_contents] is enabled, this allows to show only the container's area restricted by its own bounding rectangle.
